title: 毎日王冠の後に・そして“光”へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka dominates this battle between
multiple years of racers and flies past the finish
line like a gust of wind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than feel embittered by their loss, El
Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder enthusiastically
swear to one day overcome Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is also inspired by the exhilarating
race and becomes filled with the motivation to
surpass Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka herself swears to work hard to
keep the lead against Special Week. She simply
can't wait for the autumn Tenno Sho!
